testsuite.name: com.audioeq.equalizer.BiquadFilterTest

testcase.name: test filter with zero gain passes signal
test filter reset clears state
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected:<0.5415069258344771> but was:<0.6205248745164254> at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89) at org.junit.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:835) at testcase.name: test notch filter attenuates center frequency
